chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C.P. No.D-5057 of 2014 ______________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge Present Mr. Justice Muhammad Ali Mazhar Mr. Justice Arshad Hussain Khan Khan Muhammad Malik............... Petitioner V E R S U S Province of Sindh & others................ Respondents Date of hearing 04.10.2016 None present for the petitioner. Mr. Abdul Jalil Zubedi A.A.G. ------------------------- Muhammad Ali Mazhar, J: In fact, the case of the petitioner is that vide office order dated 16.09.2014 he was posted as Account Officer, D.M.C. East, Karachi against an existing vacancy with immediate effect, but, on the very next date i.e. 17.09.2014, this posting order was withdrawn/cancelled. The petitioner filed this petition in the month of September, 2014 against the withdrawal letter and obtained interim orders on 29.09.2014. Any particular posting is not a vested right and it is also well settled that transfer is also one of the terms and conditions of the service. Even in this case, before posting to any particular post, the posting order was withdrawn and appropriate approach was to wait for the next posting order or application may be moved to the competent authority to issue another posting order of the petitioner commensurate to his job and qualification. The matter was fixed on 24.02.2015 but the case was adjourned due to absence of petitioner and his counsel. Today again the position is same. In view of the documents available on record which we have examined with the assistance of learned A.A.G, this petition is dismissed along with pending application.

Today again the position is same. In view of the documents available on record which we have examined with the assistance of learned A.A.G, this petition is dismissed along with pending application. JUDGE JUDGE Aadil Arab
